items.title: Security Council LIVE: UN officials warn humanitarian toll in Ukraine is worsening
items.title_original: Security Council LIVE: UN officials warn humanitarian toll in Ukraine is worsening
items.summary: The Security Council met on Monday amid a sharp escalation in hostilities across Ukraine, where UN officials warned that the war has reached its deadliest point since Russia’s full-scale invasion in 2022. Briefing members, Rosemary DiCarlo, Under-Secretary-General for political affairs, said recent months had seen some of the most extensive aerial attacks of the conflict, while the humanitarian toll on civilians continued to mount on both sides of the front line.

The Southern Patagonian Icefield is the largest expanse of ice in the Southern Hemisphere outside of Antarctica. The mass of glacial ice extends hundreds of kilometers along the spine of the Andes, feeding dozens of dynamic outlet glaciers that grind their way down from higher elevations. items.title: Security Council LIVE: UN officials warn humanitarian toll in Ukraine is worsening
items.title_original: Security Council LIVE: UN officials warn humanitarian toll in Ukraine is worsening
items.summary: The Security Council met on Monday amid a sharp escalation in hostilities across Ukraine, where UN officials warned that the war has reached its deadliest point since Russia’s full-scale invasion in 2022. Briefing members, Rosemary DiCarlo, Under-Secretary-General for political affairs, said recent months had seen some of the most extensive aerial attacks of the conflict, while the humanitarian toll on civilians continued to mount on both sides of the front line.

items.contentExcerpt: Ice splintered off the southern Patagonia glacier and drifted across a growing glacial lake. The Southern Patagonian Icefield is the largest expanse of ice in the Southern Hemisphere outside of Antarctica. The mass of glacial ice extends hundreds of kilometers along the spine of the Andes, feeding dozens of dynamic outlet glaciers that grind their way down from higher elevations. items.contentExcerpt: 6月10日，小鹏集团董事长何小鹏发布内部信称，即日起其将兼任机器人业务CEO，称此举是小鹏向“物理AI公司”转型的重要一步。当前小鹏人形机器人IRON进入量产冲刺阶段，力争2026年底量产。该机器人将进入门店商用，最先应用的场景是导览、导购，会大量开放合作。此外，小鹏人形机器人也有推向海外市场的计划。

items.contentExcerpt: 14个部委联合发布《2026年纠正医药购销领域和医疗服务中不正之风工作要点》，设11项重点任务，新增涉税违法、医疗数据安全等监管板块，监管范围扩容，转向全链条系统性治理。文件还明确推进医保与药企直接结算等。专家表示，政策叠加下行业短期承压，但中长期看，政策红利将释放，行业竞争逻辑也将发生变化。
